---
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: default
    css: ../course-outline.css
    slide-number: true
    center: false
    margin: 0.05
    footer: "<a href='javascript:history.back()'>← Back</a>"
---

```{=html}
<section class="slide level2">
  <h2>III. Jesus in Creation</h2>

  <details>
    <summary><strong>A. Jesus in Creation from Scripture</strong></summary>
    <div class="lv-1">1. New Testament Passages</div>
    <div class="lv-lc">a. <a href="https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=John+1%3A1&version=WEB" target="_blank">John 1:1-3</a> — The Word (Jesus) was with God in the beginning; all things were created through Him</div>
    <div class="lv-lc">b. <a href="https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Col+1%3A15&version=WEB" target="_blank">Colossians 1:15-17</a> — Jesus is the image of the invisible God; all things created through Him and for Him; in Him all things hold together</div>
    <div class="lv-lc">c. <a href="https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Heb+1%3A2&version=WEB" target="_blank">Hebrews 1:1-3</a> — God created the world through His Son, who upholds the universe by the word of His power</div>
    <div class="lv-lc">d. <a href="https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=1Cor+8%3A6&version=WEB" target="_blank">1 Corinthians 8:6</a> — One Lord Jesus Christ, through whom are all things</div>
    <div class="lv-lc">e. <a href="https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Eph+3%3A9&version=WEB" target="_blank">Ephesians 3:9</a> — God created all things (some manuscripts: "through Jesus Christ")</div>
    <div class="lv-1">2. Old Testament Passages</div>
    <div class="lv-lc">a. <a href="https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Gen+1%3A26&version=WEB" target="_blank">Genesis 1:26</a> — "Let us make man in our image" — plural language hinting at plurality within God</div>
    <div class="lv-lc">b. <a href="https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Prov+8%3A22&version=WEB" target="_blank">Proverbs 8:22-31</a> — Wisdom personified as present and active at creation (often interpreted as pointing to the pre-incarnate Christ)</div>
     <div class="lv-lc">c. <a href="https://bibleproject.com/videos/genesis-1/" target="_blank">Creation Video — Bible Project</a></div>  
  </details>


  <details>
    <summary><strong>B. Scriptures On Six day event and man made on day six</strong></summary>
    <div class="lv-1">1. Six-Day Creation</div>
    <div class="lv-lc">a. How long is a day?</div>
      <div class="lv-detail">i. Twenty-four hours</div>
      <div class="lv-detail">ii. Daytime (daylight hours)</div>
      <div class="lv-detail">iii. An era or period of time</div>
    <div class="lv-lc">b. Scripture on days</div>
      <div class="lv-detail">i. "Morning and evening" — a day </div>
     <div class="lv-detail"><a href="jesus-in-creation_files/six day creation.html" target="_blank">ii. Six-Day Creation Scripture References</a></div>
    <div class="lv-1">3. Man Created in the Beginning (Day 6)</div>
    <div class="lv-lc">a. Popular view: man appeared billions of years after creation via evolution</div>
    <div class="lv-lc">b. Scripture on man existing from the beginning</div>
    <div class="lv-lc">c. New Testament Scriptures </div>
    <div class="lv-detail"><a href="jesus-in-creation_files/people in the beginning.html" target="_blank">i. New Testament Scriptures</a></div>
  </details>

  <details>
    <summary><strong>C. How These Truths Help Make Sense of Origins</strong></summary>
    <div class="lv-1">1. Creation of the Universe</div>
    <div class="lv-lc">a. Time, matter, and space were all created together</div>
      <div class="lv-detail">i. Einstein showed they are coupled and interdependent</div>
      <div class="lv-detail">ii. E = MC² — mass and energy are interlinked</div>
      <div class="lv-detail">iii. Therefore time, space, and mass/energy came into existence at the same moment</div>
      <div class="lv-detail">iv. <a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=w6AHcv19NIc" target="_blank">Video: Time, Space, and Matter</a></div>
    <div class="lv-lc">b. Whatever created the material world could not itself be material</div>
      <div class="lv-detail">i. <a href="https://www.youtube.com/shorts/saeW0lqCufM" target="_blank">Creator joke (clean version)</a></div>
    <div class="lv-lc">c. Second Law of Thermodynamics</div>
      <div class="lv-detail">i. Things do not naturally go from disorder to order</div>
      <div class="lv-detail">ii. Incredible complexity and order in the cosmos requires an explanation</div>
      <div class="lv-detail">iii. Fine-tuning of physical constants points to intentional design</div>
    <div class="lv-1">2. Creation of Life</div>
    <div class="lv-lc">a. Life did not spring into existence from non-life</div>
      <div class="lv-detail">i. A "simple" cell is not simple</div>
      <div class="lv-detail">ii. Information always comes from a mind — DNA and RNA are coded with information</div>
  </details>

</section>
```
